name: Substance Use Disorder Outpatient Treatment Procedure Codes
description: HCPCS and CPT codes for substance use disorder (SUD) outpatient treatment services including assessment, individual and group counseling, intensive outpatient programs, and screening/brief intervention. Used in initiation and engagement of substance use disorder treatment (IET) and follow-up after ED visit for substance use (FUA) measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Behavioral health counseling and therapy, per 15 minutes
Alcohol and/or drug services; group counseling by a clinician
Alcohol and/or drug services; case management
Alcohol and/or drug services; crisis intervention (outpatient)
Alcohol and/or drug services; intensive outpatient (treatment program)
Alcohol and/or drug services; methadone administration and/or service
Alcohol and/or drug intervention service (planned clinical services)
Alcohol and/or other drug treatment program, per hour
Alcohol and/or substance abuse structured screening and brief intervention; 15-30 minutes
Alcohol and/or substance abuse structured screening and brief intervention; greater than 30 minutes
Alcohol and/or substance abuse structured screening and brief intervention, 15-30 minutes
Alcohol and/or substance abuse structured screening and brief intervention, greater than 30 minutes
Office-based treatment for opioid use disorder, first 70 minutes
Office-based treatment for opioid use disorder, each additional 30 minutes
